2J degrees. Regarding the names of these 12 parts there is
absolutely no difficulty, as the Dvadaiam^as in each Rasi begin
with the same Rasi and end with the one that is 12th from it.
That is to say. in Mesa the 12 parts are counted from Mesa on-
wards ending in Mina. In Vrsabha the first part is Vrsabha
itself and the last Mesa, and so on.
Trimsamia-:—This is nothing but a one-degree portion of a
Rasi. Hence there should be 30 such parts in each Sign. Do
not think that these 30 parts or degree portions belong to thirty
planets, which is an impossibility. Their lords are only the
five planets viz. Mars, Mercury, Jupiter, Venus and Saturn.
The Sun and the Moon have not cared to have any say in this

GENERAL PRINCIPLES 7
matter. Do not think either that the 30 degrees of a Sign are
equally distributed among these five planets. With regard to
the distribution of these degrees there is difference in respect of
odd and even Rasis. In the odd Signs i.e. 1, 3, 5, 7. 9 and 11,
